claims.statement: Channel Tunnel length is larger than Appalachian Trail length.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Channel Tunnel length: 50.45 km. Appalachian Trail length: 3500 km.

claims.statement: Cheetah sprint is slower than Peregrine falcon dive.
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Cheetah sprint: 120 km/h. Peregrine falcon dive: 390 km/h.

claims.statement: Panama Canal length is at least 4× longer than Channel Tunnel length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Panama Canal length: 82 km. Channel Tunnel length: 50.45 km.

claims.statement: There are more squares on a chessboard than UN member states.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 64 squares vs 193 states.

claims.statement: Barcode first scanned happened before World Wide Web proposed.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. Barcode first scanned: 1974. World Wide Web proposed: 1989.
